subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet from Us unto those who have attained unto the Dawning-Place of Lights, when the Chosen One came with the sovereignty of grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح من لدنا الی الذین فازوا بمطلع الانوار اذ اتی المختار بسلطان العظمه و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @predictions and prophecies, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution
